summary: Signature Reuse Feature (Phase 46) - All core functionality tested and working correctly. The DocuSign-style signature reuse feature allows users to quickly apply previously-drawn signatures to subsequent fields without re-drawing.

signature_reuse_prompt.details: SignatureReusePrompt appears correctly when clicking empty signature field after drawing first signature. Shows thumbnail preview, 'Use this signature' and 'Draw new' buttons.

use_this_signature_button.details: Clicking 'Use this signature' applies cached signature to field and closes prompt.

draw_new_button.details: Clicking 'Draw new' opens full SignatureModal for drawing new signature.

close_cancel_button.details: Close button and backdrop click close the reuse prompt without filling field.

initials_separate_cache.details: Initials field uses separate cache slot. Drawing signature does NOT show reuse prompt for initials field. Initials have their own reuse prompt with 'Use your previous initials?' text.

apply_to_all_checkbox.details: 'Apply this signature to all my assigned signature fields' checkbox works correctly - fills all 3 signature fields at once.

page_refresh_persistence.details: Signature cache persists in sessionStorage after page refresh. SessionStorage key format: docflow.sessionSig.v1.{token}::{email}. Reuse prompt appears correctly after refresh.

already_signed_field.details: Clicking already-signed signature field opens full SignatureModal (not reuse prompt) to allow re-signing.

session_cache_clearing.details: Could not complete full signing flow due to unfilled required fields (checkbox, radio). Code review confirms clearSessionSig() is called after successful signing at line 487 in PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js.

critical_code_review_comments: SignatureReusePrompt.js: Well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
useSessionSignature.js: Correctly implements sessionStorage-based caching with separate slots for signature and initials
Session key format correctly includes token and email for signer isolation
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test documents with 3 signature fields and 2 initials fields for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signature Reuse feature is fully implemented and working. Template 5f8425c8-e067-4108-818e-cf76aaa30f6d has been updated with 3 signature fields and 2 initials fields.
features_tested: First signature field click opens full SignatureModal (no prompt, no cache yet)
Second signature field click shows SignatureReusePrompt with thumbnail
Use this signature button applies cached signature
Draw new button opens full SignatureModal
Initials field uses SEPARATE cache slot
Apply to all checkbox fills all signature fields at once
Already-signed field opens full modal for re-signing
